buildCommand: mkdir -p frontend/public/presentation && cp presentation/index.html frontend/public/presentation/ && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org https://maps.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://unpkg.com https://*.gstatic.com https://*.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' https://maps.googleapis.com; frame-src https://*.google.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
